name: QUALCOMM INC/DE
summary: Qualcomm is a global technology company that develops and commercializes foundational technologies including on-device AI, high-performance computing, and advanced wireless connectivity. It derives revenue from sales of integrated circuit products (Snapdragon and Qualcomm Dragonwing families) and licensing of intellectual property. Its platforms serve handsets, automotive (Snapdragon Digital Chassis), and IoT markets including PCs, XR devices, edge networking, and industrial applications. It operates three reportable segments: QCT (semiconductors), QTL (technology licensing), and QSI (strategic investments).

products.name: Snapdragon
products.description: Highly-integrated system-based semiconductor platforms for mobile devices, automotive, and IoT applications.

products.name: Qualcomm Dragonwing
products.description: Family of highly-integrated system-based solutions alongside Snapdragon for various device categories.

products.name: Snapdragon Digital Chassis
products.description: Automotive platform covering connectivity, digital cockpit, and ADAS/AD solutions.

products.name: Snapdragon X Series
products.description: AI-focused PC platform enabling on-device AI processing at low power for enhanced productivity.

products.name: QCT Integrated Circuit Platforms
products.description: Semiconductor chips and modules with advanced connectivity and high-performance, low-power computing for mobile, automotive, and IoT.

products.name: QTL Licensing Programs
products.description: Licensing of Qualcomm intellectual property portfolio including essential patents for wireless products.

partnerships.description: Collaboration with device manufacturers to enable next-generation digital transformation across ecosystems.
Collaboration to develop and deploy 5G networks and services.
Collaboration on industry standards including 5G, Wi-Fi, UWB, and other wireless technologies.
Collaboration to enable hybrid on-device and cloud AI workloads and services.
